title: Taste And See

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: (Spoken softly)
"Come, all who seek shelter,
and hear the song of the redeemed."
I will bless the Lord at all times,
His praise shall be my breath, my rhyme.
My soul shall boast, my heart rejoice,
Come magnify Him, lift your voice.
Taste and see that the Lord is good,
A refuge strong, where grace has stood.
Fear not, for He delivers all,
The broken hearts, He will enthrall.
The righteous cry, and He will hear,
He draws us close, His love sincere.
The angel camps, the heavens guard,
He saves the weary, mends the scarred.
Come, children, gather, learn His ways,
Walk in His light through all your days.
Turn from evil, do what’s right,
His eyes watch over, day and night.
Taste and see that the Lord is good,
A refuge strong, where grace has stood.
Fear not, for He delivers all,
The broken hearts, He will enthrall.
(Spoken softly)
"Blessed are those who find their refuge in Him."

epigraph: O taste and see that the LORD is good
styleNote: Guitar Fingerstyle Deepens · Soft Percussion Enters · Strumming Builds Intensity
